refnamediv.refpurpose: Transfer global color statistics between RGB images.

listitem.para: RGB image whose content is preserved.
RGB image supplying the target Lab color statistics.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Converts both images to Lab, matches the per-channel mean and standard deviation of the source to the reference, and converts the result back to RGB. It is useful for a quick global color grade.

refsection.title: Examples
